name: Casa Alo's Bistro
description: Casa Alo's Bistro is a cozy Italian-American restaurant in the heart of Historic Downtown Fredericksburg, Virginia. We serve house-made pastas, wood-fired pizzas, and classic Italian secondi crafted from fresh, locally-sourced ingredients. Whether it's a weeknight dinner, a Sunday brunch, or a special celebration, we make every guest feel like family.

nearby_landmarks: Walking distance from Mary Washington Hospital area

parking.street_parking: Metered street parking on Caroline Street and surrounding blocks
parking.private_lot: Free private lot accessible from Hanover Street alley, behind the building. Holds approximately 20 cars.
parking.tip: On Friday and Saturday evenings, arrive a few minutes early to secure parking.

policies.reservations: Strongly recommended for Friday/Saturday dinner. Held 15 minutes past booking time.
policies.large_groups: Groups of 8+ require advance booking. Please call at least one week ahead.
policies.cancellation: Modify or cancel at least 2 hours in advance. Large groups and private events require 48 hours notice.
policies.dress_code: Smart casual. No formal dress code required.
policies.children: Family-friendly. High chairs available. Simple pasta dishes available for children.
policies.accessibility: Fully wheelchair accessible entrance and ADA-compliant restrooms.
policies.payment: All major credit cards, contactless payments, and cash accepted.
policies.wifi: Complimentary Wi-Fi available. Ask server for password.
policies.byob: Not permitted. Full wine and beer list available.

sourcing.philosophy: We prioritize local and regional producers wherever possible.
local_partners: Produce from farms in Spotsylvania and King George counties
Rappahannock Lager — local Fredericksburg craft beer
Pasta flour and core ingredients imported from Italy
